title: Core Evolution & Configuration
description: Top-level evolve loop, system configuration loading, and canary/smoke-test gate

actors.name: Daemon
actors.description: Automated internal loop running continuous evolution cycles (--loop / --mad-dog)

actors.name: Environment
actors.description: OS environment variables that override config defaults (EVOLVER_* env vars)

actors.name: ChildProcess
actors.description: Forked child process used for canary smoke-test and daemon self-restart

use_cases.name: Run Single Evolution Cycle
steps: main() parses CLI args, detects single-run mode
Calls evolve.run() directly
Logs result; exits with code 0 or 1

use_cases.name: Start Continuous Daemon Loop
steps: main() enables loop mode, patches console with timestamps
acquireLock() writes evolver.pid; exits if another instance is running
Registers SIGINT/SIGTERM/uncaughtException handlers to releaseLock()
Sets EVOLVE_LOOP=true, conditionally sets EVOLVE_BRIDGE
Starts A2A heartbeat (a2aProtocol.startHeartbeat) and SSE event stream
Optionally starts proxy (EVOMAP_PROXY=1) or mailbox transport
Optionally auto-starts ATP merchant agent if atpMode=auto|on
Enters while(true) loop calling evolve.run() each cycle

use_cases.name: Gate Cycle on Pending Solidify
use_cases.trigger: Automatic — checked at start of every daemon loop iteration
steps: readJsonSafe(solidifyStatePath) loads evolution_solidify_state.json
isPendingSolidify(state) compares last_run.run_id vs last_solidify.run_id
If pending: sleepMs(pendingSleepMs) and continue; skipping evolve.run()
If EVOLVE_BRIDGE=false after run: rejectPendingRun() auto-rejects and marks state

use_cases.name: Load & Override System Configuration
steps: envInt/envFloat/envStr helpers read process.env at module init
Each constant falls back to a hardcoded default if env var absent/invalid

Groups: Network (HELLO_TIMEOUT_MS, HEARTBEAT_*), Solidify (CANARY_TIMEOUT_MS, MIN_PUBLISH_SCORE), Evolution (REPAIR_LOOP_THRESHOLD, PROMPT_MAX_CHARS), Ops (MAX_SILENCE_MS, LOCK_MAX_AGE_MS), Self-PR, Leak-check
All constants exported as module.exports for use by evolve, solidify, canary callers

use_cases.name: Run Canary Smoke-Test Gate
use_cases.trigger: Forked by solidify pipeline before committing an evolution
steps: canary.js executes in a forked child process (not called directly from evolve/index)
Calls require('../index.js') inside try/catch
If index.js loads without throwing: process.exit(0) — safe to solidify
If any error (syntax, missing require, runtime crash): writes error to stderr, process.exit(1) — abort solidify
use_cases.note: canary.js is the last safety net; catches broken patches before daemon restarts with corrupt code

use_cases.name: Adaptive Sleep Between Cycles
steps: If cycle failed or took < idleThresholdMs: double currentSleepMs (capped at maxSleepMs)
If cycle succeeded and took >= idleThresholdMs: reset to minSleepMs
OMLS: getScheduleRecommendation() returns sleep_multiplier; triggers distillation or exploration if idle
Saturation: reads last_run.signals; force_steady_state → 4x sleep, evolution_saturation → 2x sleep
Jitter: random 0–250ms added to avoid lockstep restarts
Final sleep = max(minSleepMs, (base + jitter) * satMult * omlsMult)

use_cases.name: Self-Restart Daemon (Suicide Gate)
steps: Opens evolver log file for append
spawn(process.execPath, [__filename, ...args], {detached:true}) to fork replacement
child.unref() to detach
releaseLock()
process.exit(0) to terminate current instance

use_cases.name: Acquire / Release Singleton Lock
steps: acquireLock(): writes PID to evolver.pid with exclusive flag wx
If EEXIST: reads existing PID, sends signal 0 to check liveness
Stale lock (dead PID) → overwrites and takes over
Live lock → logs 'already running' and exits 0
releaseLock(): reads PID file, unlinks only if pid === process.pid

use_cases.name: Bootstrap Environment (.env loading)
use_cases.trigger: Module load time at top of index.js
steps: require('dotenv').config({path: path.join(getRepoRoot(), '.env')})
Silently warns if dotenv not found — non-fatal
Populates process.env before config.js constants are evaluated

key_relationships: index.js:main() includes UC01, UC02, UC06, UC07, UC08, UC09
UC02 extends UC03 (loop checks pending solidify each iteration)
UC02 extends UC06 (adaptive sleep after each cycle)
UC02 extends UC07 (suicide gate checked each cycle)
UC05 (canary) is invoked by solidify pipeline, not by evolve loop directly
UC04 (config loading) is used_by evolve.run(), solidify, canary, a2aProtocol
UC08 is included_by UC02 (daemon must hold lock while running)

system_boundaries.core_entry_point: index.js — CLI dispatcher and daemon controller
system_boundaries.evolution_engine: src/evolve.js — obfuscated; exposed as evolve.run() async function
system_boundaries.configuration: src/config.js — env-var-overridable constants, grouped by concern
system_boundaries.smoke_test_gate: src/canary.js — forked child, validates index.js loads cleanly

important_notes: src/evolve.js is obfuscated (all internal names are hex-encoded _0x...). The public interface is only evolve.run() (async, no parameters, called from index.js).
canary.js is NOT called from index.js or evolve.js directly — it is a standalone script spawned by the solidify pipeline as a pre-commit safety check.
config.js has no classes or state — pure constants evaluated once at require() time.
Daemon loop has multiple sleep multipliers that compose: base × saturation(1x/2x/4x) × OMLS(idle scheduler).
EVOLVE_BRIDGE env var controls whether pending runs are auto-rejected in loop mode (false = no solidify bridge, auto-reject state without git rollback).
Singleton lock uses evolver.pid at project root; stale-lock detection via process.kill(pid, 0).
source_files_analyzed: src/evolve.js (obfuscated — internal functions not analyzable, public API: evolve.run())
